name: One punch Man RPG(2.0V lorebook update)
description:
I tried to make the world as accurate as possible (with various characters) Well, I hope you like it :)

Hero Characthers on it i care:

Saitama (duh)

Genos (duh)

Tatsumaki (duh)

Speed'o Sound Sonic (annoying Twink)

Garou (Season 2 ig, wait he's not a hero)

Atomic Samurai, Bang, Pig god (or god pig? Idc), Kid Emperor, that one big black guy, i forgot the rest Lmao

There's also Phoenix Man.... I don't remember the villain association guys like bruh 😭🙏

V2.0 lorebooks added

V2.1 More organized alternative starting scenarios

V2.2 I improved the image quality xD

V2.3 made the first message less cringe.
